response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, and deep systems expertise in event-driven and real-time architectures, but lacks clear evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments, scaling engineering teams to 30+, or designing multi-agent frameworks for financial decisioning — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in event-driven, low-latency systems (DLang, microservices, streaming)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling and infrastructure
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance
Lacks evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No public evidence of production multi-agent AI systems with feedback loops, observability, or model-agnostic architecture
